top_signals.title: Permian natural gas production increased faster than crude oil
top_signals.summary: The Permian region's marketed natural gas production grew from 17.2 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) in 2021 to 27.6 Bcf/d in 2025, a 60% increase, according to data from our latest Short Term Energy Outlook. Over the same period, crude oil production grew by 39%, going from 4.7 million barrels per day (b/d) to 6.6 million b/d. The higher growth in natural gas production is the result of increasing gas-oil ratios (GOR).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The biggest wealth transfer in history is here: How the next generation will spend the trillions
top_signals.summary: The greatest wealth transfer is underway, and heirs who are set to inherit are preparing to use the money very differently from the generations that built it.

top_signals.title: Novak Djokovic joins investment firm with stake in Mexico’s Azteca Stadium
top_signals.summary: Novak Djokovic has joined General Atlantic, the firm that holds and investment in Mexico football’s Azteca Stadium. The Serbian tennis player – who will take on Wu Yibing at Wimbledon next week as he looks for an unlikely 25th Grand Slam title – will act as a global strategic advisor for the firm that has [...]
